title: Update Tableau Error Page Link Text and Open in New Window
story: As a user encountering a Tableau connection error, I want the help link to say 'Creating and Managing personal access tokens' and open in a new window, so that I can easily access troubleshooting documentation without leaving the app.
description:
Update the Tableau error page link:
- Change text from generic Tableau Pulse link to "Creating and Managing personal access tokens"
- Point to: `https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/link-tableau-personal-access-token-to-datatools-pro#errors`
- Ensure the link opens in a new window/tab (`target="_blank"`)
acceptance_criteria: Link text reads 'Creating and Managing personal access tokens'
Link URL points to the DataTools Pro tutorial page with #errors anchor
Link opens in a new browser tab/window
ux_changes: Updated Tableau error page help link text and behavior to open tutorial documentation in a new window.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the link text change and new-window behavior on dev environment.
